summary:
**Context Block (Updated)**

- Repo: `NWBLot` at `/home/limstudio/WorkStation/NWBLot`, branch `main`.
- GitHub CLI `gh` unavailable; publish via `git push`.
- Standing rules:
- Always include `.cozter` changes when publishing.
- Treat `.idea/workspace.xml` as local-only unless explicitly requested.

- Last pushed state:
- `origin/main` and `HEAD` are at commit `71d63ed` (`Add final-build diagnostic channels`).
- Earlier pushed work includes GLSL migration (`051f062`), mesh packed-vertex decode fix (`fa92077`), and prior Linux/testbed/path-case commits.
- Diagnostics channel policy already implemented/pushed:
- `assert`: `dbg` only
- `fatal assert`: `dbg`/`opt`/`fin`
- `warning`: `dbg`/`opt`
- `critical warning`: `dbg`/`opt`/`fin`
- `error`: `dbg`/`opt`/`fin`
- `info`: `dbg`/`opt`
- `essential info`: `dbg`/`opt`/`fin`

- New work in this conversation (uncommitted, not pushed): two additional “find more places to insert logs” passes.
- Decision rule used: add logs at externally visible boundary failures that otherwise return silent sentinel values (`false/nullptr/0/{}`), but avoid noisy logs in expected control-flow paths (polling/not-ready/no-op helpers/optional-feature fallbacks/internal parsers).

- Pass 1 additions (mostly Vulkan boundary failures):
- `core/graphics/vulkan/vulkan_buffer.cpp` (`getBufferMemoryRequirements` null resource log).
- `core/graphics/vulkan/vulkan_texture.cpp` (`getTextureMemoryRequirements` null resource log).
- `core/graphics/vulkan/vulkan_staging_texture.cpp` (`mapStagingTexture` null texture log).
- `core/graphics/vulkan/vulkan_raytracing.cpp` logs for AS bind/build failures, SBT/scratch allocation failures, OMM build failures.
- `core/graphics/vulkan/vulkan_queries.cpp` logs for event/timer query failure paths.
- `core/graphics/vulkan/vulkan_stubs.cpp` logs for sparse/cluster/ray-tracing stub boundary failures (null AS/tiling/tile mapping/scratch).

- Pass 2 additions (non-Vulkan + more Vulkan boundary coverage):
- `core/assets/asset_registry.cpp` rejection-reason logs for codec registration failures (null/duplicate/type conflict cases).
- `core/assets/asset_cooker.cpp` rejection-reason logs for cooker registration failures.
- `core/frame/frame.cpp` frame-level logs for graphics init failure, project update callback returning false, graphics frame update failure.
- `impl/ecs_graphics/renderer_system.cpp` logs when render command list/pipeline creation fails.
- `core/graphics/vulkan/vulkan_resource_bindings.cpp` warnings for ignored/invalid binding-set items and unsupported resource-type writes.

- Validation/tool results:
- Repeated sentinel scans with `rg`/`awk` narrowing to public/boundary APIs.
- `git diff --check -- ':!.idea/workspace.xml'` passed after edits.
- Builds passed multiple times across all variants:
- `cmake --build --preset linux-clang-dbg --target testbed --parallel 8`
- `cmake --build --preset linux-clang-opt --target testbed --parallel 8`
- `cmake --build --preset linux-clang-fin --target testbed --parallel 8`
- `origin/main...HEAD` remains `0 0` (no local commits ahead/behind).

- Current working tree state:
- Uncommitted modified files include (confirmed):  
  `.cozter/sessions/c93aeca0e5be.json`, `Testbed/project_testbed_runtime.cpp`, `core/assets/asset_cooker.cpp`, `core/assets/asset_manager.cpp`, `core/assets/asset_registry.cpp`, `core/frame/frame.cpp`, `core/frame/frame_win.cpp`, `core/graphics/common.cpp`, `core/graphics/vulkan/vulkan_buffer.cpp`, `core/graphics/vulkan/vulkan_queries.cpp`, `core/graphics/vulkan/vulkan_raytracing.cpp`, `core/graphics/vulkan/vulkan_staging_texture.cpp`, `core/graphics/vulkan/vulkan_texture.cpp`, `core/graphics/vulkan/vulkan_stubs.cpp`, `core/graphics/vulkan/vulkan_resource_bindings.cpp`, `impl/ecs_graphics/renderer_system.cpp`, plus local-only `.idea/workspace.xml`.
- Nothing has been committed or pushed from these new logging passes yet.

- Open commitments/current next step:
- No unresolved implementation tasks from the logging scan itself.
- Awaiting user direction to either continue scanning, or commit/push current uncommitted log additions (including `.cozter`, excluding `.idea/workspace.xml`).
